creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Created attachment 229691
wordpress-5.8.2.patch

chinese/wordpress-zh_CN
chinese/wordpress-zh_TW
french/wordpress
german/wordpress
japanese/wordpress
russian/wordpress
www/wordpress

fix:
  portlint(1),portclippy(1) compliant. *1
  pkg-message.in *2

add:
  do-install-DOCS-on *3
  cpe *4

*1 all languages.
*2 www,french,german,japanese,russian
*3 www,zh_CN,zh_TW,french,german
*4 zh_CN,zh_TW
